textByHashes.3c336096be901b98b2f92b73be200f3e9321b06c: I say! Where on Gielinor did that voice come from?
textByHashes.cc710702994b2753ea664f8a644331a8df8d2d3e: Why yes. Yes I can. My word. Is that...is that one of the gods? Guthix perhaps? Saradomin?
textByHashes.690e266648b9dcdaed9351c1bc6dce70866a8c07: Egad! You're not...Zamorak...are you? I mean, uh...begging your pardon of course, my Lord. No offence intended!
textByHashes.48415cd0ef7c6509312b5372890c6953422c5dca: Oh. Oh I see! Oh, yes. How clever! Remarkable idea! However did you think of that? Good show, old bean!
textByHashes.a06ddf87003160b9f7b63134556a9dfc30c63a03: Rupert the Beard. At your service, old fruit.
textByHashes.30f937b5b3a18f16ce52a7ce0d07e6b9942dd821: Yes, old ogleroot! On account of my wonderfully long bearded chin, you see.
textByHashes.5587c8688287fc34399f42d9b983e9b0971a9fa8: What am I doing? Well, I guess I'm stuck in a matter of speaking. Dear me, yes! I'm stuck. And I speak in the King's speech, I'll have you know.
textByHashes.038591be0cd83f812697600a8c9037dbb98b83c0: Which K...? Why, THE King old spud! THE King! Only one worth mentioning in my opinion.
textByHashes.0bf159927f3bad1edfe140b6a616faa144df4dd4: What? That namby pamby nincompoop? Not on your nelly! More fluff in the ears than sense, that man!
textByHashes.0ba28488fdd7a58d449c6d899af6cfad73f79006: By Guthix, I know how you can help me!
textByHashes.3b61fcf1a17669e4fc2c288a11a68017610d7baa: Ye gods! We can't talk like this anymore. You need to find a way up to speak to me privately, old boot!
textByHashes.5ecb4bb3de1eeb732b8c917768bcb164a4db9049: That woman is a princess. She's holding me prisoner. If she sees you I will be in even more trouble and who knows what she'll do to you!
textByHashes.0cc8c28c4682198970f990daabf9d84074c465af: Drain pi...oh, yes! Of course! Well, hello again old cigar! How great to se...er...hear from you again.
textByHashes.ca3046c2451921a0a755a9635e68bbbecdbc2b47: Jolly good show, old bean! What do you suggest?
textByHashes.e245f2488c5dc516ee21a6d83f672fcd31a44152: Climb down? What what what? It's miles! People are like little ants from up here...oh wait...no that's just a line of ants on the wall.
textByHashes.4b4e1aefd8c533c156f4a20f464bcc956c1444d5: Tish, posh and nonsense! You and your gangly long legs might be fine, but we dwarves are of shorter, stockier breed, old toothbrush!
textByHashes.94cc6586105bafd1f45c403130fcdad1ac0d0f62: Indeed, definitely and most indubitably not! Think of something else!
textByHashes.9af664513c0ab3ab65cb41b8dd1c26d63e40afe6: Hmm, a worthy endeavour I would say. Possibly with its merits. Yes, indeed. Now how will you get up here?
textByHashes.f5b2640a7a874069aafeaabead3dc41cfec8634b: I don't know if that would work, old trousers. These walls are made from very smooth and flat stone. Excellent workmanship. Simply excellent.
textByHashes.6105430fa0c9a09290485ab3edb593e62f3f866c: Right you are, old pockets! Keep thinking! These are excellent ideas you're having!
textByHashes.91e37ee781c73e99f3fbc286f11d694efaf21aee: Not really, old spoon. There's not much up here except for me and my beard. Ha ha!
textByHashes.a93abfd22f5a81cea630c3b68d6d39905e2c207f: Eh? Let down my beard? Have you lost it down there, old chum? Going a bit loopy?
textByHashes.f2d0e920a09957ecdc041e78290344d8f34ed6c6: Ah ha ha! Excellent idea, old tomato! Here it comes then!
textByHashes.4bd303a219d88beb4e0084008f852c8aa25c1f56: By Guthix and Saradomin, that's astounding! You are an absolute marvel! Can you really fly?
textByHashes.edd0f743f95b58830b792a544b29e7b6b48246db: I see. Not very sporting in the circumstances, was it?
textByHashes.567bb00eafcd7aa0897f73fdbf6761c208de8945: I'm afraid I have no idea! It's a long way down as I said, so I can't see much from way up here!
textByHashes.9c832924d4ada2b04223e9ce763caa00eeaec5cb: Lies! Lies! Now can you see anything down there that might help, old chicken?
textByHashes.58691bb622ef466171ecfb7a799afa1dfb97cc59: Hang on, old underpants!...you're going to ask the princess to help you climb up this wall to see her prisoner.
textByHashes.4cc8c6cc6e4bc07e0ef9abd0414d55a2438d11e1: Reason, eh? Hmmm. Well you could give that a try.
textByHashes.8504cd5d210007601f5cad5ec5616c1fc6cfe6e0: Well, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to try, old socks! What would you say?
textByHashes.dedd3966c75c13cf236da09764a58dfb8743f0e8: Reason, eh? Hmmm. Well, you could give that a try.
textByHashes.19a717902e2b35999903ad90b0b9bf1becb3de3e: What ever has gotten into your head, old war wound? Kill the princess. No, no, no. We don't do that sort of thing round here.
textByHashes.e1ff9b17fd6c28da20485860767daedcb94fa34e: Well, yes of course. In a manner of speaking, yes. But...but that still doesn't give us the right to go around lopping people's heads off because they're not very nice!
textByHashes.bd0f7d6a5195dc046e06a1f90da61538b32b4b1c: No, there must be another way! Keep thinking!
textByHashes.c5fe8b4c41fabb359496225c902b7afa171a480f: Yes, I get the idea. Now be a sport and think of a better idea!
textByHashes.00f0a2976cd428f58e8de8747ba1ebefa44cc735: Eh? What? Oh! You don't have to use that anymore, old spoon! Climb up to speak to me!
textByHashes.f1b70e793ad96995272cc89475d208a8a66a970b: Up my beard of course! It was your idea after all, old spinach.
textByHashes.f9dd4ff1acf71c45a509b2b4c6015458a5b24877: Oh. Oh I see! Oh, yes. How clever! Remarkable idea! How ever did you think of that? Good show, old bean!
textByHashes.bf2a704dbacede0a79a13f4e9c9c7b13351f7a73: Yes, old turnip. On account of my wonderfully long bearded chin, you see.
textByHashes.f7a27d70befd271ac9f1030c562f2a0192585451: Hmmm. No, no, I can't think of anything at the moment. I'm a bit stuck. Let me know if you get any ideas though.
